CustomField.description: Default critical-path designation for this permit type. When NEPA_Permit_Record_Creator creates a nepa_required_permit__c instance from this type, it copies this value to nepa_required_permit__c.nepa_is_critical_path__c. Critical-path permits block ROD/FONSI advancement and drive the permit gap risk penalty.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When checked, permits of this type are critical-path by default — their absence blocks ROD/FONSI and increases litigation risk score.
CustomField.label: Default Critical Path
